name: Tower of TORI
detailed_description:
--- Fail, learn, and conquer!---

A simple yet challenging "die-and-retry" 2D action game is here!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Try out the demo to see if it suits you!

And if you're ready for the full challenge, add it to your wish list!
Scheduled for release in April 2025!

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

The tower in this game is packed with all sorts of brutal, unfair traps,

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

One hit from spikes or enemies means instant death...

With simple controls, your gaming skills and perseverance will be put to the test...

But don't worry—if you're not aiming for an S rank, even casual gamers should be able to clear the game!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Utilize the three powers of "Fire," "Ice," and "Wind"

and aim for an S rank in all 33 stages!

How many times will you die before reaching the end...?

Oh, and there are 15 achievements too!
Try to collect them all!


If you manage to clear the entire game without a single mistake on your first attempt,
you’re either a clairvoyant or a gamer with insane skills and reflexes.

The developer firmly believes that 90% of players will get a game over at the first stage’s trap.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you do manage to clear the entire game without game over on your first try,
please report it to Clover Soft’s X account!

Sorry for my poor English:(
